name: CabaCraft Guide
landing_text: A reference for CabaCraft.$(br2)At world creation the player picks a $(l:races/overview)race$(/l), a $(l:classes/overview)primary class$(/l), and a $(l:secondaries/overview)secondary class$(/l). After joining the world, the player may also belong to a $(l:factions/overview)faction$(/l).$(br2)Items in CabaCraft come from one of three sources: vanilla, the player's class catalogue, or the $(l:traders/overview)trader$(/l) economy.
